zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd於1342年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan17歲，母親Joan Verch RHUN13歲。他於1364年與Crisle verch Gawdyn在威爾士格拉莫爾根利安達福結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1394年在英國奧可福爾享年52歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd于1342年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan17岁，母亲Joan Verch RHUN13岁。他于1364年与Crisle verch Gawdyn在威尔士格拉莫爾根利安達福结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1394年在英国奧可福爾享年52岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Ieuan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd was born in 1342, in Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan, was 17 and his mother, Joan Verch RHUN, was 13. He married Crisle verch Gawdyn in 1364, in Llandaff, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1394, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Oxfordshire, England.

fr.LLANDAF COURT, SOUTH GLAMORGAN, WALES: Llandaff, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd est né en 1342, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Joan Verch RHUN, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Crisle verch Gawdyn en 1364, à Llandaff, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1394, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd 1342 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan 17 und seine Mutter Joan Verch RHUN 13. Er hat 1364 in Llandaff, Glamorgan, Wales Crisle verch Gawdyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1394 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd è nato il nel 1342 nel Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Joan Verch RHUN, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Crisle verch Gawdyn nel 1364, nel Llandaff, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1394, nel Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ieuan ap Gruffyddが1342年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardiganは17歳，母Joan Verch RHUNは13歳であった。1364年にウェールズグラモーガンランダッフでCrisle verch Gawdynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1394年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで52歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd(이)가 1342년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Verch RHUN(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1364년 웨일스 글램르건 랜다프에서 Crisle verch Gawdyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1394년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd nasceu em 1342, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Joan Verch RHUN, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Crisle verch Gawdyn em 1364, em Llandaff, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1394, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.LLANDAF COURT, SOUTH GLAMORGAN, WALES: Llandaff, Glamorgan, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd родился в 1342 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Verch RHUN, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Crisle verch Gawdyn в 1364 г. в местности лландафф, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1394 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ieuan ap Gruffydd nació en 1342, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Joan Verch RHUN, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Crisle verch Gawdyn en 1364, en Llandaff, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1394, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
